category_sources: source_facts.description says it provides two-factor authentication on the command-line; source_facts.executables includes 2fa.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is rsc_2fa; source_facts.repo is the official rsc/2fa project.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Go package documentation for rsc.io/2fa; official GitHub README is also an official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/rsc/2fa, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies two-factor authentication on the command-line; source_facts.executables lists the 2fa CLI.
